{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Lastleaf Fortress
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Starsweep Tower]] is hovering over [[Lastleaf Fortress]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
